'''Ylix''' was a backwater [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Ylix system/Legends|Ylix system]] between [[Anobis]] and [[Ithor/Legends|Ithor]]. It was a long-time rival of nearby [[Goelitz]], which it finally [[Goelitz-Ylix War|defeated in battle]]. It was also the home of the [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] [[Gallandro/Legends|Gallandro]].
